# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
Search for the invariant itself before trying to audit the coverage around it.

## Expected selection
do_not_use

## Why
This is still discovery work, so a coverage audit would be premature.

## Expected object
A deflection toward invariant discovery work before any coverage audit.

## Boundary notes
Do not pretend a coverage map exists when the stable truth is still undefined.

## Verification hooks
- says the invariant is not yet known
- refuses to fake a coverage audit
- redirects toward discovery or clarification first
